changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.request_task_type (id, code, assignable, expiration_key, supporting, request_type_id) VALUES(nextval('request_task_type_seq'), 'APPLY_FOR_AN_UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT', true, '', null, (SELECT id FROM public.request_type WHERE code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT'));

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_task_type (id, code, assignable, expiration_key, supporting, request_type_id) VALUES(nextval('request_task_type_seq'), 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT', true, '', null, (SELECT id FROM request_type WHERE code = 'ADMIN_TERMINATION'));

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_SAVE_APPLICATION', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_SUBMIT_APPLICATION', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_CANCEL_APPLICATION', false);

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM request_task_action_type WHERE code IN ('ADMIN_TERMINATION_SAVE_APPLICATION', 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_SUBMIT_APPLICATION', 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_CANCEL_APPLICATION');

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT' AND rtat.code in ('ADMIN_TERMINATION_SAVE_APPLICATION', 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_SUBMIT_APPLICATION', 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_CANCEL_APPLICATION');

changeSet.sql:

INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_FINAL_DECISION' AND rtat.code in ('ADMIN_TERMINATION_FINAL_DECISION_SAVE_APPLICATION', 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_FINAL_DECISION_NOTIFY_OPERATOR_FOR_DECISION');

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_SAVE_APPLICATION_REVIEW', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_SAVE_REVIEW_GROUP_DECISION', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_SAVE_FACILITY_REVIEW_GROUP_DECISION', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_UPLOAD_REVIEW_GROUP_DECISION_ATTACHMENT', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_REVIEW' AND rtat.code in ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_SAVE_APPLICATION_REVIEW', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_SAVE_REVIEW_GROUP_DECISION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_SAVE_FACILITY_REVIEW_GROUP_DECISION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_UPLOAD_REVIEW_GROUP_DECISION_ATTACHMENT');

rollback.sql:
DELETE FROM request_task_type_action_type WHERE request_task_action_type_id IN ( SELECT id from request_task_action_type where code in ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_SAVE_APPLICATION_REVIEW', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_SAVE_REVIEW_GROUP_DECISION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_SAVE_FACILITY_REVIEW_GROUP_DECISION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_UPLOAD_REVIEW_GROUP_DECISION_ATTACHMENT'));
DELETE FROM request_task_action_type WHERE code IN ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_SAVE_APPLICATION_REVIEW', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_SAVE_REVIEW_GROUP_DECISION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_SAVE_FACILITY_REVIEW_GROUP_DECISION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_UPLOAD_REVIEW_GROUP_DECISION_ATTACHMENT');

rollback.sql:
DELETE FROM request_task_type_action_type WHERE request_task_action_type_id IN ( SELECT id from request_task_action_type where code in ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_SAVE_APPLICATION_REVIEW', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_SAVE_REVIEW_GROUP_DECISION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_SAVE_FACILITY_REVIEW_GROUP_DECISION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_UPLOAD_REVIEW_GROUP_DECISION_ATTACHMENT'));

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_REVIEW' AND rtat.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_UPLOAD_SECTION_ATTACHMENT';

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: insert into request_resource (resource_type, resource_id, request_id) select 'SECTOR_ASSOCIATION', atu.sector_association_id, rr.request_id from request_resource rr inner join account_target_unit atu on rr.resource_id::bigint = atu.id where rr.resource_type = 'ACCOUNT';

P70383

changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'PERFORMANCE_DATA_UPLOAD_ATTACH_REPORT_PACKAGE', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'PERFORMANCE_DATA_UPLOAD_PROCESSING', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'PERFORMANCE_DATA_UPLOAD_COMPLETE', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'PERFORMANCE_DATA_UPLOAD_SUBMIT' AND rtat.code in ('PERFORMANCE_DATA_UPLOAD_ATTACH_REPORT_PACKAGE', 'PERFORMANCE_DATA_UPLOAD_PROCESSING', 'PERFORMANCE_DATA_UPLOAD_COMPLETE');

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_task_type (id, code, assignable, expiration_key, supporting, request_type_id) VALUES(nextval('request_task_type_seq'), 'MOA_PAYMENT_SUBMIT', true, '', null, (SELECT id FROM request_type WHERE code = 'MOA_PAYMENT'));

P35066
P35066
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_task_type (id, code, assignable, expiration_key, supporting, request_type_id) VALUES(nextval('request_task_type_seq'), 'PERFORMANCE_ACCOUNT_TEMPLATE_DATA_UPLOAD_SUBMIT', true, null, null, (SELECT id FROM request_type WHERE code = 'PERFORMANCE_ACCOUNT_TEMPLATE_DATA_UPLOAD'));

changeSet.author: P35066
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'PERFORMANCE_ACCOUNT_TEMPLATE_DATA_UPLOAD_ATTACH_REPORT_PACKAGE', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'PERFORMANCE_ACCOUNT_TEMPLATE_DATA_UPLOAD_PROCESSING', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'PERFORMANCE_ACCOUNT_TEMPLATE_DATA_UPLOAD_COMPLETE', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'PERFORMANCE_ACCOUNT_TEMPLATE_DATA_UPLOAD_SUBMIT' AND rtat.code in ('PERFORMANCE_ACCOUNT_TEMPLATE_DATA_UPLOAD_ATTACH_REPORT_PACKAGE', 'PERFORMANCE_ACCOUNT_TEMPLATE_DATA_UPLOAD_PROCESSING', 'PERFORMANCE_ACCOUNT_TEMPLATE_DATA_UPLOAD_COMPLETE');

rollback.sql: INSERT INTO request_task_type (id, code, assignable, expiration_key, supporting, request_type_id) VALUES(nextval('request_task_type_seq'), 'MOA_PAYMENT_SUBMIT', true, '', null, (SELECT id FROM request_type WHERE code = 'MOA_PAYMENT'));

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM request_type WHERE code = 'MOA_PAYMENT';

changeSet.author: P70383
P70383
P70383
P70383
P70383
apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.comment: Rename sicCode to sicCodes by removing old value and adding the new one

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.comment: Add CCA schema versions in request action payload
changeSet.sql: UPDATE request_action SET payload = jsonb_set(payload, '{underlyingAgreement,facilities}', ( SELECT jsonb_agg( jsonb_set(element, '{facilityDetails}', element -> 'facilityDetails' || '{"participatingSchemeVersions": ["CCA_2"]}') ) FROM jsonb_array_elements(payload -> 'underlyingAgreement'->'facilities') element )) WHERE type IN ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_SUBMITTED', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_REJECTED', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_ACCEPTED', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_ACTIVATED', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_MIGRATED', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_SUBMITTED', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_REJECTED', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_ACCEPTED', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_ACTIVATED')

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
apostolouk@unisystems.gr
apostolouk@unisystems.gr
apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
update request set payload = jsonb_set(payload, '{underlyingAgreement, targetPeriod6Details, targetComposition, throughputUnit}', payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit') where payload -> 'underlyingAgreement' -> 'targetPeriod6Details' -> 'targetComposition' ->> 'isTargetUnitThroughputMeasured' = 'false' and payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit' is not null;
update request set payload = jsonb_set(payload, '{underlyingAgreement, targetPeriod5Details, details, targetComposition, throughputUnit}', payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit') where payload -> 'underlyingAgreement' -> 'targetPeriod5Details' -> 'details' -> 'targetComposition' ->> 'isTargetUnitThroughputMeasured' = 'false' and payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit' is not null;

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
update request_task set payload = jsonb_set(payload, '{underlyingAgreement, targetPeriod6Details, targetComposition, throughputUnit}', payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit') where payload -> 'underlyingAgreement' -> 'targetPeriod6Details' -> 'targetComposition' ->> 'isTargetUnitThroughputMeasured' = 'false' and payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit' is not null;
update request_task set payload = jsonb_set(payload, '{underlyingAgreement, targetPeriod5Details, details, targetComposition, throughputUnit}', payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit') where payload -> 'underlyingAgreement' -> 'targetPeriod5Details' -> 'details' -> 'targetComposition' ->> 'isTargetUnitThroughputMeasured' = 'false' and payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit' is not null;

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
update request_action set payload = jsonb_set(payload, '{underlyingAgreement, targetPeriod6Details, targetComposition, throughputUnit}', payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit') where payload -> 'underlyingAgreement' -> 'targetPeriod6Details' -> 'targetComposition' ->> 'isTargetUnitThroughputMeasured' = 'false' and payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit' is not null;
update request_action set payload = jsonb_set(payload, '{underlyingAgreement, targetPeriod5Details, details, targetComposition, throughputUnit}', payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit') where payload -> 'underlyingAgreement' -> 'targetPeriod5Details' -> 'details' -> 'targetComposition' ->> 'isTargetUnitThroughputMeasured' = 'false' and payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit' is not null;

changeSet.author: loukerip
changeSet.sql:
update request r set payload = jsonb_set(payload, '{underlyingAgreementProposed, targetPeriod6Details, targetComposition, throughputUnit}', payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit') where payload -> 'underlyingAgreementProposed' -> 'targetPeriod6Details' -> 'targetComposition' ->> 'isTargetUnitThroughputMeasured' = 'false' and payload ?? 'underlyingAgreementProposed' and payload ?? 'accountReferenceData' and payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit' is not null and exists (select 1 from request_type rt2 where rt2.id = r.type_id and rt2.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION');
update request r set payload = jsonb_set(payload, '{underlyingAgreementProposed, targetPeriod5Details, details, targetComposition, throughputUnit}', payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit') where payload -> 'underlyingAgreementProposed' -> 'targetPeriod5Details' -> 'details' -> 'targetComposition' ->> 'isTargetUnitThroughputMeasured' = 'false' and payload ?? 'underlyingAgreementProposed' and payload ?? 'accountReferenceData' and payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit' is not null and exists (select 1 from request_type rt2 where rt2.id = r.type_id and rt2.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION');

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
update request_task_history set payload = jsonb_set(payload, '{underlyingAgreement, targetPeriod6Details, targetComposition, throughputUnit}', payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit') where payload -> 'underlyingAgreement' -> 'targetPeriod6Details' -> 'targetComposition' ->> 'isTargetUnitThroughputMeasured' = 'false' and payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit' is not null;
update request_task_history set payload = jsonb_set(payload, '{underlyingAgreement, targetPeriod5Details, details, targetComposition, throughputUnit}', payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit') where payload -> 'underlyingAgreement' -> 'targetPeriod5Details' -> 'details' -> 'targetComposition' ->> 'isTargetUnitThroughputMeasured' = 'false' and payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit' is not null;

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_REQUEST_PEER_REVIEW', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_SUBMIT' AND rtat.code = 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_REQUEST_PEER_REVIEW';

changeSet.author: P70311
P70311
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_SUBMIT_PEER_REVIEW_DECISION', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW' AND rtat.code = 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_SUBMIT_PEER_REVIEW_DECISION';

changeSet.author: P70311
P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'PEER_REVIEW_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT', false)

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'ADMIN_TERMINATION_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW' AND rtat.code = 'PEER_REVIEW_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT';

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: update request_action set payload = jsonb_set(payload, '{accountReferenceData, sectorAssociationDetails}', jsonb_build_object('subsectorAssociationName', payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'subsectorAssociationName', 'schemeDataMap', jsonb_build_object('CCA_2', jsonb_build_object('sectorMeasurementType', payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'measurementType', 'sectorThroughputUnit', payload -> 'accountReferenceData' -> 'sectorAssociationDetails' -> 'throughputUnit') ))) where payload ?? 'accountReferenceData';

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql: UPDATE request_action ra SET payload = jsonb_set( ra.payload, '{payload,subsectorAssociationName}', to_jsonb(sa.name) ) FROM subsector_association sa WHERE ra.type = 'TARGET_UNIT_ACCOUNT_CREATION_SUBMITTED' AND (ra.payload -> 'payload' ->> 'subsectorAssociationId') IS NOT NULL AND sa.id = (ra.payload -> 'payload' ->> 'subsectorAssociationId')::bigint;

changeSet.author: P70311
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_REQUEST_PEER_REVIEW', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_REVIEW' AND rtat.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_REQUEST_PEER_REVIEW';

changeSet.author: P70311
P70311
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_SUBMIT_PEER_REVIEW_DECISION', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW' AND rtat.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_SUBMIT_PEER_REVIEW_DECISION';

changeSet.author: P70311
P70311
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW' AND rtat.code = 'PEER_REVIEW_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT';

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM request_task_type_action_type WHERE request_task_action_type_id IN ( SELECT id from request_task_action_type where code = 'PEER_REVIEW_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT') AND request_task_type_id IN ( SELECT id from request_task_type where code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW');

P70311

INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REQUEST_PEER_REVIEW', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_REVIEW' AND rtat.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REQUEST_PEER_REVIEW';

changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_SUBMIT_PEER_REVIEW_DECISION', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW' AND rtat.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_SUBMIT_PEER_REVIEW_DECISION';

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW' AND rtat.code = 'PEER_REVIEW_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT';

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM request_task_type_action_type WHERE request_task_action_type_id IN ( SELECT id from request_task_action_type where code = 'PEER_REVIEW_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT') AND request_task_type_id IN ( SELECT id from request_task_type where code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW');

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_task_type (id, code, assignable, expiration_key, supporting, request_type_id) VALUES(nextval('request_task_type_seq'), 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION', true, '', null, (SELECT id FROM request_type WHERE code = 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING'));

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_SAVE_APPLICATION', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_NOTIFY_OPERATOR_FOR_DECISION', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_CANCEL_APPLICATION', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION' AND rtat.code in ('CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_SAVE_APPLICATION', 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT', 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_NOTIFY_OPERATOR_FOR_DECISION', 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_CANCEL_APPLICATION');

rollback.sql:
DELETE FROM request_task_type_action_type WHERE request_task_action_type_id IN ( SELECT id from request_task_action_type where code in ('CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_SAVE_APPLICATION', 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT', 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_NOTIFY_OPERATOR_FOR_DECISION', 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_CANCEL_APPLICATION'));
DELETE FROM request_task_action_type WHERE code IN ('CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_SAVE_APPLICATION', 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT', 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_NOTIFY_OPERATOR_FOR_DECISION', 'CCA3_EXISTING_FACILITIES_MIGRATION_ACCOUNT_PROCESSING_ACTIVATION_CANCEL_APPLICATION');

changeSet.author: P70311
P70311
apostolouk@unisystems.gr
changeSet.sql:
update request set payload = (payload || jsonb_build_object('underlyingAgreementDocuments', jsonb_build_object('CCA_2', payload -> 'underlyingAgreementDocument'))) - 'underlyingAgreementDocument' where payload ->> 'payloadType' in ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_REQUEST_PAYLOAD', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REQUEST_PAYLOAD') and payload ?? 'underlyingAgreementDocument';
update request_action set payload = (payload || jsonb_build_object('underlyingAgreementDocuments', jsonb_build_object('CCA_2', payload -> 'underlyingAgreementDocument'))) - 'underlyingAgreementDocument' where type in ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_ACCEPTED', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_ACTIVATED', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_ACCEPTED', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_ACTIVATED') and payload ?? 'underlyingAgreementDocument';

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
apostolouk@unisystems.gr
apostolouk@unisystems.gr
P70311
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'FACILITY_AUDIT_PRE_AUDIT_REVIEW_SAVE_APPLICATION', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'FACILITY_AUDIT_PRE_AUDIT_REVIEW_SUBMIT_APPLICATION', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'FACILITY_AUDIT_CANCEL_APPLICATION', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'FACILITY_AUDIT_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'PRE_AUDIT_REVIEW_SUBMIT' AND rtat.code IN ('FACILITY_AUDIT_PRE_AUDIT_REVIEW_SAVE_APPLICATION', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_PRE_AUDIT_REVIEW_SUBMIT_APPLICATION', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_CANCEL_APPLICATION', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT');

changeSet.author: P70311
P70311
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'FACILITY_AUDIT_AUDIT_DETAILS_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SAVE_APPLICATION', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'FACILITY_AUDIT_AUDIT_DETAILS_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SUBMIT_APPLICATION', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'AUDIT_DETAILS_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SUBMIT' AND rtat.code IN ('FACILITY_AUDIT_AUDIT_DETAILS_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SAVE_APPLICATION', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_AUDIT_DETAILS_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SUBMIT_APPLICATION', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_CANCEL_APPLICATION', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT');

rollback.sql:
DELETE FROM request_task_type_action_type WHERE request_task_action_type_id IN ( SELECT id from request_task_action_type where code IN ('FACILITY_AUDIT_AUDIT_DETAILS_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SAVE_APPLICATION', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_AUDIT_DETAILS_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SUBMIT_APPLICATION', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_CANCEL_APPLICATION', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT') AND request_task_type_id in (SELECT id from request_task_type where code = 'AUDIT_DETAILS_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SUBMIT'));
DELETE FROM request_task_action_type WHERE code IN ('FACILITY_AUDIT_AUDIT_DETAILS_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SAVE_APPLICATION', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_AUDIT_DETAILS_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SUBMIT_APPLICATION');

changeSet.author: P70383
P70383
P70311
P70311
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'FACILITY_AUDIT_TRACK_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SAVE_RESPONSE', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'FACILITY_AUDIT_TRACK_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SUBMIT_RESPONSE', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'FACILITY_AUDIT_TRACK_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_COMPLETE_APPLICATION', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'AUDIT_TRACK_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS' AND rtat.code IN ('FACILITY_AUDIT_TRACK_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SAVE_RESPONSE', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_TRACK_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SUBMIT_RESPONSE', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_TRACK_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_COMPLETE_APPLICATION', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_CANCEL_APPLICATION', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT');

rollback.sql:
DELETE FROM request_task_type_action_type WHERE request_task_action_type_id IN ( SELECT id from request_task_action_type where code IN ('FACILITY_AUDIT_TRACK_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SAVE_RESPONSE', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_TRACK_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SUBMIT_RESPONSE', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_TRACK_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_COMPLETE_APPLICATION', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_CANCEL_APPLICATION', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT') AND request_task_type_id in (SELECT id from request_task_type where code = 'AUDIT_TRACK_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS'));
DELETE FROM request_task_action_type WHERE code IN ('FACILITY_AUDIT_TRACK_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SAVE_RESPONSE', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_TRACK_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_SUBMIT_RESPONSE', 'FACILITY_AUDIT_TRACK_CORRECTIVE_ACTIONS_COMPLETE_APPLICATION');

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql: update request_action set payload = jsonb_set(payload, '{officialNotice}', jsonb_build_array(payload -> 'officialNotice'), false) where type in ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_ACCEPTED', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_ACTIVATED') and (payload)::jsonb ?? 'officialNotice';

UPDATE request_action SET payload = jsonb_set(payload #- '{officialNotice}', '{officialNotices}', payload#>'{officialNotice}') where type in ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_ACCEPTED', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_ACTIVATED') and (payload)::jsonb ?? 'officialNotice';

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.comment: Add variationImpactsAgreement in determination of variation request action payload
changeSet.sql: UPDATE request_action SET payload = jsonb_set(payload, '{determination,variationImpactsAgreement}', 'true') WHERE type IN ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_ACCEPTED', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_ACTIVATED')

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO request_task_type (id, code, assignable, expiration_key, supporting, request_type_id) VALUES(nextval('request_task_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_SUBMIT', true, '', null, (SELECT id FROM request_type WHERE code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION'));

changeSet.author: apostolouk@unisystems.gr
apostolouk@unisystems.gr
P70383
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_SAVE_APPLICATION', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_UPLOAD_SECTION_ATTACHMENT', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_NOTIFY_OPERATOR_FOR_DECISION', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_REQUEST_PEER_REVIEW', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_SUBMIT' AND rtat.code in ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_SAVE_APPLICATION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_UPLOAD_SECTION_ATTACHMENT', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_NOTIFY_OPERATOR_FOR_DECISION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_CANCEL_APPLICATION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_REQUEST_PEER_REVIEW');

rollback.sql:
DELETE FROM request_task_type_action_type WHERE request_task_action_type_id IN ( SELECT id from request_task_action_type where code in ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_SAVE_APPLICATION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_UPLOAD_SECTION_ATTACHMENT', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_NOTIFY_OPERATOR_FOR_DECISION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_CANCEL_APPLICATION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_REQUEST_PEER_REVIEW'));
DELETE FROM request_task_action_type WHERE code IN ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_SAVE_APPLICATION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_UPLOAD_SECTION_ATTACHMENT', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_NOTIFY_OPERATOR_FOR_DECISION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_REQUEST_PEER_REVIEW');

changeSet.author: P70383
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_type (id, code, assignable, expiration_key, supporting, request_type_id) VALUES(nextval('request_task_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_ACTIVATION', true, '', null, (SELECT id FROM request_type WHERE code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION'));
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_ACTIVATION' AND rtat.code in ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_ACTIVATION_SAVE_APPLICATION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_ACTIVATION_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_ACTIVATION_NOTIFY_OPERATOR_FOR_DECISION', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_CANCEL_APPLICATION');

changeSet.author: P70311
P70383
P70383
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_SUBMIT_PEER_REVIEW_DECISION', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_APPLICATION_PEER_REVIEW' AND rtat.code in ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_REGULATOR_LED_SUBMIT_PEER_REVIEW_DECISION', 'PEER_REVIEW_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT');

changeSet.author: P70383
P70383
changeSet.sql: UPDATE request_action SET payload = payload - 'determination' - 'reviewAttachments' - 'sectionsCompleted' - 'underlyingAgreement' - 'reviewGroupDecisions' - 'reviewSectionsCompleted' - 'facilitiesReviewGroupDecisions' - 'underlyingAgreementAttachments' where type in ('UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_APPLICATION_ACTIVATED', 'UNDERLYING_AGREEMENT_VARIATION_APPLICATION_ACTIVATED')

changeSet.author: P70311
P70311
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO request_task_action_type (id, code, blocked_by_payment) VALUES (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'NON_COMPLIANCE_DETAILS_SAVE_APPLICATION', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'NON_COMPLIANCE_DETAILS_SUBMIT_APPLICATION', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'NON_COMPLIANCE_CANCEL_APPLICATION', false), (nextval('request_task_action_type_seq'), 'NON_COMPLIANCE_UPLOAD_ATTACHMENT', false);
INSERT INTO request_task_type_action_type (request_task_type_id, request_task_action_type_id) SELECT rtt.id, rtat.id FROM request_task_type rtt CROSS JOIN request_task_action_type rtat WHERE rtt.code = 'NON_COMPLIANCE_DETAILS_SUBMIT' AND rtat.code IN ('NON_COMPLIANCE_DETAILS_SAVE_APPLICATION', 'NON_COMPLIANCE_DETAILS_SUBMIT_APPLICATION', 'NON_COMPLIANCE_CANCEL_APPLICATION');
